choice_context: A person is deciding which wine to buy for dinner, considering flavor profile, value, and personal taste.

choice_only.label: Choice Only
choice_only.description: Binary choice, no dimension information shown.

choice_readonly_sliders.label: Choice + Read-Only Sliders
choice_readonly_sliders.description: Binary choice with top-5 dimension scores shown (not adjustable).

choice_adjustable_sliders.label: Choice + Adjustable Sliders
choice_adjustable_sliders.description: Binary choice with top-5 adjustable dimension sliders that co-move.

choice_checkboxes.label: Choice + Relevance Checkboxes
choice_checkboxes.description: Binary choice with top-5 dimensions shown as checkboxes.

inference_affirm.label: Inferences: Affirm / Remove
inference_affirm.description: Affirm or remove model inferences about your preferences.

inference_categories.label: Inferences: Category Selection
inference_categories.description: Adjust the category for each inference about your preferences.

dimensions.name: Fruit Intensity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the prominence and ripeness of fruit character in aroma and flavor.

dimensions.name: Body and Structure
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on perceived weight, intensity, and tannin/alcohol presence on the palate.

dimensions.name: Acidity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the perceptible sharpness, freshness, and mouthwatering quality.

dimensions.name: Oak Influence
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the presence and intensity of oak-derived flavors and textures.

dimensions.name: Sweetness
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the perceptible sweetness on the palate and finish.

dimensions.name: Aromatic Complexity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the number and evolution of detectable aromas.

dimensions.name: Earthy/Savory Character
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the presence and intensity of earthy or savory notes.

dimensions.name: Aging Potential
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the wine's structural components that support aging.

dimensions.name: Traditional Style
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the wine's adherence to traditional winemaking and terroir expression.

dimensions.name: Value for Money
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the perceived quality-to-price ratio.

dimensions.name: Effervescence
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the presence and quality of bubbles.

dimensions.name: Playfulness
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the wine's branding, label, or unconventional presentation.

dimensions.name: Tropical Aroma Intensity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the presence and intensity of tropical fruit aromas.

dimensions.name: Sessionability
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the wine's alcohol content and perceived drinkability in quantity.

dimensions.name: Floral Aroma Intensity
dimensions.scoring_guidance: Rate based on the presence and intensity of floral aromas.
